name: Lo Mein Noodles with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon ground white or black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Add noodles to boiling water; cook according to package directions until tender but still firm, 2-3 minutes.
2. Drain noodles; rinse under cold running water. Drain again.
3. Combine noodles and sesame oil in a large bowl; toss lightly to coat.
4. Cut enough chives into 1-inch pieces to measure 1/2 cup; set aside.
5. In a small bowl, combine oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and pepper.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add ginger and garlic; stir-fry for 10 seconds. Add shrimp; stir-fry until shrimp begin to turn pink, about 1 minute. Add chives and sherry; stir-fry until chives begin to wilt, about 15 seconds. Add half of the bean sprouts; stir-fry for 15 seconds.
7. Add remaining bean sprouts and oyster sauce mixture; stir-fry noodles until thoroughly heated, about 2 minutes.
